summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR Profiles Platform. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed: business profile subtypes (WiFi, hotel, tarjeta, etc.) render correct form fields; scan history page loads with filters, stats, and empty state; sidebar Historial link navigates to /scan-history correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileDataEditor.js correctly implements switch statement for all business subtypes (hotel, wifi, tarjeta, catalogo, turismo, redes, evento, checkin, encuesta) on lines 926-950
ScanHistoryPage.js properly displays filters, stats cards, and empty state message
DashboardSidebar.js includes 'Historial' link with href='/scan-history' and data-testid='sidebar-scan-history'
Backend /api/scan-history endpoint returns correct structure: {scans: [], total: int, profiles: []}
seed_data_creation: Created test business profiles via API: hotel, wifi, tarjeta, catalogo, turismo, redes, evento, checkin, encuesta
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Scan History page at /scan-history works with filters and empty state. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_qr_profiles_api.py - all 25 tests pass.
